title: 強く気高い“ヒシアマゾン”に

text_block_list.text:
One day, Hishi Amazon and I spend some time
deliberating over whether we should pursue the
Tiara tour, or the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, and that's a wrap! Let's keep it up and
give tomorrow the same energy, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look! President Rudolf and Brian are on a
partner run!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're locked in a real dead heat! Do your
best, you two!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Brian and the president are on a
partner run?

Hishi Amazon glances toward the field in the
distance where two runners are racing on the turf.

They speed around the fourth corner, charging
towards the finish line before them. Symboli
Rudolf is in the lead, but the gap is slim.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

The two are at a stalemate until Narita Brian
makes a break for it. With a ferocious yell, she
eclipses Symboli Rudolf, then speeds past her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Brian is amazing! But wait, the president is
still in the game!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: She stole back her spot!

Neither will give up the lead. The two hurtle
toward the finish line, coming in with a blinding
intensity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. You've sharpened your skills yet again,
Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch. You might've won this time, but don't get
comfortable.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll devour you.

The race was breathtaking in more ways than one,
and all the spectators who witnessed it stand in
silent awe.

Hishi Amazon watches the two racers intently, her
gaze heavy with somber bitterness.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...I still have a long way to go, huh?

I'm starting to worry about her, but time goes on,
heedless of my stress, and several days later...

She's slated to run in a 2,000-meter turf race for
a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's do this! It's time to bring the heat,
Teach!

Hishi Amazon is bursting with enthusiasm when
the scrimmage kicks off. Before long, however...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
(Damn, I'm completely boxed in. It's practically
air-tight!)

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are on Hishi Amazon today, and she's just
passed the third corner! She's currently in sixth
place!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I can break away on the outside... That shouldn't be a problem with these legs!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Brian is amazing! But wait, the president is
still in the game!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (What's gotten into me? I'm actin' so damn weak!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (C'mon! I gotta go faster—faster! I won't be able to beat her if I don't!)

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
There's only 200 meters left to go! The current
lead is still going strong!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is gaining momentum from the
inside—but number five is closing in from the
outside! Number five has taken the lead!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is gunning for the front! Will she be
able to take the lead or not?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: Number five holds the lead right to the finish line!

The scrimmage ends with an uncharacteristically
poor performance from Hishi Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Man, what the heck is wrong with me?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My head wasn't in that race at all... I wimped out,
missed the timing of my final sprint, and then
made that absolutely pathetic scramble at the
end!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So much for always jabbering on about givin' it
my complete all, Hishi Amazon-style!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That racing wasn't even worthy of myself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So... So what right do I have to be worryin' about
Narita Brian?!

I could tell something was off with Hishi Amazon
while watching the race.

Once she's calmed down a little, I ask her to
explain what's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't get that one-on-one between Brian and
the president out of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The entire field was silent, burning with tension.
They took the crowd's breath away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's when I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm worthy of having a one-on-one
with Brian—not as I am now!

Hishi Amazon's hands are gripped into tight,
shaking fists.

I try to think fast, wondering if it would be better
to comfort her, or encourage her, but before I
can make my decision...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I've made up my mind!

She faces me with such a determined expression
that I completely forget my worries.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If Brian's gunnin' to crush the Triple Crown tour,
then I wanna crush the Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: If she's gonna be the top of her tour, I'm gonna be the top of mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll train like I mean it—and I'll prove that I'm
worth fighting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And then, at the Arima Kinen... At the toughest
race there is...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll finally have my one-on-one with Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely get to her level this year! I haven't
lost yet, and I'm not gonna lose in the future,
either!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Teach?!

Hishi Amazon has me captivated by her passion.
Soon enough, I'm nodding in agreement.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's right!

Our desire for victory reignited, we get back on
track and start running toward the Oka Sho.
